author: lOrm
content: Closing as tracked-future-roadmap-not-active-bug. Phase 1 of the speculation engine (#166) landed (NoOpSpeculationEngine + trait surface + 23 tests). Phase 2+ (OverlaySpeculationEngine, prediction heuristic, acceptance workflow) is forward-looking enhancement work, not a regression or defect. The scope here is fully captured in the parent #166 design comment; a fresh issue can be opened when work actually starts. Reopen or re-file if priorities shift.
